Terror Forged Mask  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FACE
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 4
CHA: -5 WIS: +7
SV MAGIC: +5
Effect: Fear (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 6.0) at Level 25
WT: 1.5 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR
Race: HUM ERU
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Terror Forged Mask
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FACE
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 4
CHA: -5 WIS: +7
SV MAGIC: +5
Effect: Fear (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 6.0) at Level 25
WT: 1.5 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR
Race: HUM ERU
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Mordien Asmadi
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 05:31:50
Page Updated:Thu Aug 9th, 2018

Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 40
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
The Summoning of Terror

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Paineel


Uploaded August 9th, 2018 by Drewinette
Send a correction
Post Comment
Current status of this item
QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2004 at 9:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759911393
61 posts
I got this last night, (03/20/04).

-It is Hum/Eru usable
-It is no drop
-It is Magic and Lore
-Slot: face
-stats are as follows; AC 4, Cha -5, Wis +7, SVMagic +5
-It has no diety restrictions
-The spell is Fear
-It is an unlimited use clickable effect
-The click effect is not usable til some lvl above 19 (since my cleric is 19 and he can't use it yet, but my guess is 20 much like many other quest reward click items from the original eq era)
-As far as being able to use it from inventory, I'll have to get back to you on that, I was called into work and didn't think to try to see before I logged.

Cause - Barbarian Warrior
Orphius - Erudite Cleric

Drinal Server

CHA: -5 WIS: +7

WT: 1.5 Size: SMALL

Effect Level: 25
-----
Any Slot / Can Equip = If you CAN equip it, it'll work from ANY SLOT after you reach 25.
▲ Page top
Nerfing
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2004 at 1:13 AM Rating: Decent
Valdon
674 posts
First of all in my opinion, what would make the game interesting is if you COULD get spells intended for other classes. I think since you get fear, its kind of dumb to get an item with fear. NOW. the old effect for this is just a touch disgusting for a cleric to have....

I do have a weird question about this item, and all 'nerfed items'. When an item is nerfed... does every instance of that item change? perminently? wherewhere in the game? Like... I wake up one day and my mask casts fear?!?

Because I have (rarely) heard of people selling pre-nerfed items. Im confused. Or items that change in every way and ARE replacements. Only example I can think of is Stien of Moggok... I think changed entirely....

So is EVERY stein different?
____________________________
· 'Valdon Gravedancer' Terris-Thule. Dwarven Cleric 34th circle.
· 'Junglebug Sugarpants' Terris-Thule. Halfling Druid. 52nd season.
· 'Shinook Eldergod' Terris-Thule. Troll Shaman of 32nd rite.
· 'Soultree Vixen' Terris-Thule. Woodelf Ranger of 34th season.
▲ Page top
RE: Nerfing
QuoteReply
# Mar 20 2004 at 10:42 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591784332903
View User Forum
86 posts
No.

People routinely sell pre-nerfed Circlets of Shadow (no s) that proc an insta-cast invis for sk's/necros. When an item is nerfed, from then on, all instances of that item that drop have the nerfed stats. Those that are in people's possession before the nerf are usually untouched.
▲ Page top
RE: Nerfing
QuoteReply
# Oct 20 2004 at 6:18 PM Rating: Decent
Valdon
674 posts
thank you :) I realize for example my friend has a pre-nerf (not lore) Centi long.... so he could duel weild em. I was just not sure if any nerfs were so hardcore it effected all....
____________________________
· 'Valdon Gravedancer' Terris-Thule. Dwarven Cleric 34th circle.
· 'Junglebug Sugarpants' Terris-Thule. Halfling Druid. 52nd season.
· 'Shinook Eldergod' Terris-Thule. Troll Shaman of 32nd rite.
· 'Soultree Vixen' Terris-Thule. Woodelf Ranger of 34th season.

# Nov 01 2003 at 12:52 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759801853
219 posts
What the effect used to be:

Spell Info: Call of Bones
1: Illusion: Unknown(367)
2: Increase Mana by 8 per tick
4: Ultravision
7: Decrease Hitpoints by 16 per tick

Classes: NEC/34

Pretty spiffy it was, if ya ask me =x too spiffy...

# May 02 2003 at 8:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760140938
4 posts
Dont do this quest for this item until your faction is up in Paineel. I had no idea that Paineel was a locked city.

It is discouraging to camp and bring all the items and then realize you arent getting in.
▲ Page top
RE: PAINEEL FACTION
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2004 at 3:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784027102
View User Forum
Scholar
38 posts
Having had a Eru necro who was obviously born in paineel, i know how you get into the city without a key... i usually let 2-3 KOS characters thru the door per session. In other words, just get a newbie or someone else with a key to trigger the door lock for ya, and waltz right in. there was always someone in there killing guards. =)
▲ Page top
RE: PAINEEL FACTION

52 posts
Fatigue Rejuvenation spell It even says the yellow bar is fatigue in the tutorial * say it right or dont say it at all *
▲ Page top
Faction
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2002 at 7:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760154378
4 posts
What level of faction do you need to complete this quest?
▲ Page top
RE: Faction
QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2004 at 9:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759911393
61 posts
The gaurd wont give you a key to the city till you are at least amiable, but you can enter the city as soon as you are dubious as long as someone is willing to let you in. I got in while I was indiff and the quest npc in the cleric guild hall would not give me the quest intro text. didn't try to ask the response question to see if I could bypass her lack of responsiveness, but then again, I didn't have to, I had about 20-30 kobald molars that I turned in over at the sk guild in order to raise my fac standing quite quickly from indiff to amiable. I kept conning him after each turn in till i got the amiable message. once I had amiable all the cleric guild quest npc's were more than glad to share their quests with me. At the same time I would reccommend not going over board with handing in molars, it screws up faction fast with all the good erudites really quick, (which in my case, being a faithful erudite cleric of prexus, is very unfavorable,) but if you have been killing dog boys in the warrens for a while and doing positive fac quests with the good erudites, it shouldn't hurt much to turn in 20 or so.

Cause - Barbarian Warrior
Orphius - Erudite Cleric
▲ Page top
#Shakuden, Posted: Dec 29 2001 at 11:43 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Call of Bones is a necro summon pet spell!
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 11 2002 at 1:08 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Actually no. Its the level 34 version of the mana-to-hps spells.
#Discordia, Posted: Jan 28 2002 at 10:04 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) To be more precise it's An Illusion Skeleton + Ultravision + 16 HPs to 8 Mana conversion. The level 34 Necro research spell. A very nice thing to have on tap.

actualy the cobalt BP has clickable invigorate wich is a self only 90 point healing spell . i have not see any class who has this spell. some ppl confuse invigorate with invigore wich is just a stamina rejuvination spell

QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2001 at 11:16 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The effect is no longer CoB. The effect was changed since "One class should not have one of another classes spells." A cleric with this spell would be way cheap. Also, a cleric getting this would be like a necro getting items with a right click effect of healing.
▲ Page top
